description:
REQUIRES: start the Mistral server first — scripts/run-mistral.sh (Mistral-Small-3.2-24B-Instruct-2506-UD-Q5_K_XL, pinned sampling params in the script). Single 3090: stop the Qwen3.5-27B server before starting Mistral, and coordinate with any in-flight tag_concepts run (todo:18c5f1f1) which needs the Qwen up. Confirm what is actually serving before the run and pass the matching --model provenance string (the staged_edges.model column must reflect the real endpoint model).

Prereqs: chunk embeddings (previous ticket) and chunk nodes in the DB (graph_bootstrap, todo:2fb963e9 under the tagging parent — run it standalone first if the tagging line has not started; shared prerequisite, not a tagging dependency).

Run: python3 scripts/propose_edges.py --provider llamacpp --model Mistral-Small-3.2-24B-Instruct-2506-UD-Q5_K_XL.gguf (default --top-n / --min-similarity unless prior-campaign values are documented — check git log / docs before overriding).

Done: staged_edges rows exist pairing transcendental-magic chunks/concepts with other traditions; counts by proposed type (PARALLELS/CONTRASTS) and confidence recorded in close note; no writes to live edges.
